recentTweets.text:
Our Democracy Summer fellows are fired up ahead of their first Weekend of Action!

Proud to be working with @jamie_raskin and @MaxwellFrostFL to engage the next generation and win the midterms by electing Democrats like @RebeccaForNJ07 right here in New Jersey! https://t.co/xvlVNmsobm

Let’s be clear about what this speech was: a desperate attempt by a failing president to attack our elections ahead of midterms he is going to lose.

No matter how outrageous, Trump’s lies won’t silence the millions fed up with reckless war, rising costs, and ICE lawlessness.

It was important for @KeanForCongress to tell us why he was absent, but he still has more questions to answer.

While his constituents were left wondering where he was, Tom Kean was signing off on stock trades. This is why Americans distrust politicians. NJ-7 deserves someone

“Argentina do it again, and they set a date with Spain, Sunday in New Jersey in the World Cup Final!!”

Congratulations to Spain and Argentina on reaching the World Cup Final. See you here in Jersey!

I guess now Americans can see the face of who is responsible when they have to pay for high gas and grocery prices. Americans have paid 70M more Trump coins for gas and diesel since the Iran war began. 1100 Trump coins per household in higher gas and grocery costs. https://t.co/TiqtFUlpvK

Trump is again trying to drum up baseless election conspiracies ahead of the November elections.

Americans are tired of endless war, skyrocketing gas prices, and a president that isn't looking out for them. Voters will make their voices heard, whether Trump wants them to or not.

Sending love and support to Captain Sully and his family today. It takes a lot of courage to tell the world that you have Alzheimer's. Thank you Captain for sharing your story, and I hope we can work together to bring awareness to Alzheimer's and beat it for good.

“No country is allowed to charge tolls or fees on an international waterway.”

“We believe international waterways should be free of tolls.”

That’s what Rubio and Vance said just last month. Now Trump is imposing a 20% toll on the Strait. Will they stand up for what they said?

"It was very lonely."
"Nothing in my life prepared me for this."
"I can't do this anymore."

This is the reality of raising kids while caring for aging parents. I live it every single day. Legislation I’m pushing in Congress would make this easier.
https://t.co/8x6yYO5dFO

The Housing Bill is now law today despite no signature from Trump. I don’t think he realized we don’t need his signature after 10 days. Now he can never take credit for actions to lower costs. Let’s make sure all Americans know he opposed actions to lower housing costs. https://t.co/VcTT66zsQ6

I worked alongside men like Mohammad as a civilian advisor on the ground in Afghanistan. Him and thousands of other Afghans risked their lives to fight with our servicemembers.

Is this how we should treat our allies who fought shoulder to shoulder with us?

When I worked in Afghanistan as a civilian advisor to our military, I saw Danish Forces fighting alongside ours, some giving their lives for a war started in the defense of America after 9/11. It’s shameful to see Trump insulting our steadfast ally.

250 years ago, the Declaration of Independence was read aloud for the first time in Philadelphia and Trenton.

That day, America learned the words "we the people", "all men are created equal", and "life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness" - the rallying cry of our new nation. https://t.co/Wt45Dj3btY

Graham Platner needs to end his campaign immediately. 

Ms Racicot’s claims are credible and severe; he should listen to the Mainers who have lost confidence and called for him to step aside. 

The people of Maine deserve a candidate that can focus completely on them and be a
Thank you Team USA for uniting our nation and inspiring millions including my little boys. We will keep growing our soccer nation. https://t.co/2ABehY9l3E

250 years ago, the American people chose freedom and independence from Britain. That was when we stopped being "subjects" and started to be "citizens" who have the power in a democracy.

We still refuse to be bullied and bossed around like subjects. We are citizens. https://t.co/ypHRWdMWIU

Happy Fourth of July! 250 years ago today, our Founding Fathers signed the Declaration of Independence here in Philadelphia and began the greatest experiment in democracy the world had ever seen.

Have fun, be safe, and take some time to reflect on how far we’ve come since 1776. https://t.co/ZwY0xp5gRt
I’ve achieved a new level of parenthood today. Couldn’t be happier. https://t.co/UuQuHbOPC2

Even though we celebrate Independence Day on July 4th, the United States of America became independent 250 years ago today, on July 2nd.

That was the day the Continental Congress officially voted to declare independence from Great Britain. Happy independence day!
It's on the Lego bracket, which means it's official. Go USA!! https://t.co/hLDFZSkNy7
Amazing! So proud of Team USA for toughing out a hard second half. They showed what they are made of. Now let’s win in Seattle!

Trump and his family have made over $2.3B since he was sworn in last year.  

How much has your family made?

I wish Congressman Kean continued progress in his battle against depression. I come from a family with a history of depression and have seen my loved ones struggle.
 
I believe every person should have access to mental health support, including paid time off and sick leave.

Trump is trying to send $1.6 BILLION of your taxpayer dollars to his sons through their investment in a mining firm. This is American foreign policy being used to benefit Trump and his family, not the American people. We've never seen this much corruption.
https://t.co/idIz4jbRVZ

"Ambition must be made to counteract ambition."

"Power must never be trusted without a check."

"The accumulation of all powers... in the same hands... may justly be pronounced the very definition of tyranny."

We can't ignore the Founders. We need checks and balances.

250 years ago today, Jefferson finished his first draft of the Declaration of Independence. The document went through many changes before it was signed on July 4th, but those changes were key to uniting 13 separate colonies together around shared ideas: equality, liberty, and the https://t.co/GQLnpAclhL

This is just horrible. I couldn't imagine the pain of being separated from my two boys because of an attack like this. Pete is a great father who loves his children more than anything. Wishing him and Chasten strength and support as they navigate this awful situation.

This is ridiculous and wrong to be absent for over 100 days with no explanation to your constituents and then immediately just start asking for money from political insiders. Congressman Kean should cancel this insult to his district and start by having a public town hall to

New Jersey knows what it's like to get screwed over by Donald Trump. He's doing it again with this temper tantrum over the housing bill.

Instead of going to his golf club in Bedminster, he should visit Newark or Atlantic City and see the damage he's done to our communities.

Rebecca Bennett is exactly the kind of fighter and next generation leader New Jersey families need in Washington. I am proud to stand with her in her race, and I look forward to helping her flip NJ-7, take back Congress, and work alongside her in Washington.

Every American needs to see that Trump is refusing to sign a bipartisan bill that would help millions of Americans struggling to afford housing. When he said before “I don’t think about Americans’ financial situations,” he clearly meant it. 

I will push Congress to stand against https://t.co/yZerNoBAdm

We just passed for the very first time a bipartisan resolution across both the House and the Senate condemning Trump’s Iran war. It’s time to stop these constant ceasefires and to end this war once and for all. https://t.co/YJao0JDOBy

It's almost America's 250th birthday, but 251 years ago today, Washington was traveling through New Jersey to take control of the Patriot Army in Massachusetts. His pre-Revolution journey would shape the military campaign in NJ and define it as the Crossroads of the Revolution. https://t.co/nszEHG0ooW

World Cup tourist: “People say Go Birds all the time here, even when the Eagles are not playing?"

Correct! Go Birds! And go Team USA!

The next generation of leaders are ready to step up and do their part to help Democrats win the midterms. I joined @jamie_raskin and @MaxwellFrostFL to welcome this new class of Democracy Summer fellows, and I can't wait to host 10 here in New Jersey. https://t.co/ksL6bYbExG
Happy Father’s Day to all the dads out there. What an indescribable joy of a journey fatherhood has been. https://t.co/CXDy5Ihqf1
The South Lawn of the White House is for the people, not for making profit. https://t.co/J7oNCg5Yt6
World Cup brings the world to discover Wawa! I love it
2-0 SHUTOUT! Amazing game USA. Clinched a spot in next round. Let’s go! https://t.co/3v5CppMmHO
There are, in fact, limits. https://t.co/j4PSiXXdyh
Incredible scenes coming out of New York today for the Knicks parade. Hope everyone has a great time!

Oct 2025: Trump — “100 percent by me and some friends of mine.”

Dec 2025: Trump — “We’re donating a building that’s approximately $400 million”

March 2026: Trump — “This is taxpayer-free. We have no taxpayer putting up 10 cents”

May 2026: Trump — “All of this is paid for by

Did you know that a majority of World Cup games are being played on New Jersey grass?

Over half the tournament's pitches were grown by experts at Rutgers University. Only the best Jersey grass for the best players in the world!

Welcome to Morristown, the Military Capital of the Revolution 🇺🇸

There is so much history in this town, and 250 years later, this community has come together to fight back against ICE raids.

After 250 years, Morristown is still fighting for the values that built our country. https://t.co/jVgHRokUhD

This isn't a celebration of America 250. This is corruption on full display on the White House lawn:

➡️ Trump owns shares in both UFC and Paramount

➡️UFC CEO Dana White donated $1 million to a pro-Trump super PAC

➡️ One of the event's sponsors donated $35 million to MAGA, Inc.
Knicks are champions! Never seen anything like this before in my lifetime. Basketball at its absolute finest.
Tonight is the first game of this World Cup played in NJ and Game 5 for the Knicks. One of the more special sports days we’ve had. Hope everyone is having fun! https://t.co/O1wNdcc6GK
Amazing goal to end this huge win! What a perfect way to start the World Cup. Let’s go!

This is one of the most extraordinary human moments I’ve seen on air. A few months ago Bill Ritter embraced my family after my father’s Alzheimer’s diagnosis. Now we all need to throw our love and care behind Bill and join forces against Alzheimer’s.

I've served in the Situation Room. It's a place where only the most sensitive national security matters of our country are decided. It's not where the president's advisers should gather to plot a coverup of his involvement in the Epstein Files.

The first game of the World Cup just kicked off! ⚽️🏆

This is going to be an amazing 39 days. My boys are so excited to have the world's best players right in our backyard. I hope you take some time to enjoy this incredible experience leading up to the Finals here in New Jersey!

I got a chance this week to spend time with Ms. Rachel at the Capitol as she advocated for children being caught in the middle of broken and cruel immigration policies. 

Power doesn’t always come from our title, it can come from the depths of our humanity and dedication to care. https://t.co/SJBGu1BZYz

“I love the inflation”
- Donald Trump

Inflation is rising and crushing American families at the pump and in the grocery store, all because of Trump's war in Iran that is continuing to spiral out of control.

The American people can end this chaos in November and elect Democrats who will stop the war and lower costs.

With all we know about ICE's abuse in places like Delaney Hall and the affordability crisis hurting American families, Trump and Republicans are ramming through billions in new ICE funding. It's either money for you or money for ICE's lawlessness. That's our choice in November.

You will see a lot more of this anti-election rhetoric by Trump and his Republican allies leading up to the midterms. These are attacks on voters and the democratic process. We need to all speak out and defend our votes. Every voter deserves to have their voice heard.

GeoGroup has on multiple occasions denied me access to Delaney Hall, so the fact that they claim "qualified immunity" because they're subject to government oversight is a ridiculous and lawless argument. They will be held accountable for their actions.
https://t.co/SKHxD3RNXJ

Remember, the constant efforts by Trump to disparage and undermine journalists are not separate from the purposeful dismantling of 60 Minutes and other independent media. This is all connected and coordinated.

Just shameful. This ballroom is one giant grift for Trump to enrich his friends. Meanwhile your gas prices are still over $4 a gallon, inflation is up, and there's no end in sight. 

This is why we need to take back Congress.

This is the next generation of leadership in New Jersey, but their races aren’t over yet. Rachel, Zach, and Rebecca all have competitive elections against Republican incumbents in November. Let’s all work to get them elected and take back the House. END

kurdistanMentions.text: My boys woke up this morning and said last night was “magical.” Thanks everyone in the arena, at home in Jersey, and across the country cheering us on. Now let’s convert this energy into action and win the White House, Senate and House in 75 days! https://t.co/T54S8N5kUQ

Yesterday we stood with each other in response to the backsliding of rights. But what about today? What about tomorrow?  What about next week or next month? What about November? We need to sustain this solidarity and convert this energy into action. Let’s make that promise. END https://t.co/w4hkqHpfpA

I felt proud. Really proud that my community came together. We showed solidarity. I spoke and said that their energy is my energy and my energy is theirs. We help each other through these tough moments. And our community stood in solidarity with towns all across America 10/11 https://t.co/Ys8OmDIbfR

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Andy Kim. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2024-08-22T14:52:08Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

I need more fellow South Jerseyans I can work with to strengthen our part of the state that is often overlooked. I know @ZMullock will https://t.co/Kt6Rpk8MYt

Rachel Peace is a small business owner, a single mother, and a member of my Next Generation Leadership Training cohort! I am so proud to see her stepping up to challenge the status quo that only the well-off and well-connected can serve in government. Her voice is more important https://t.co/DbfHLFJvPK

New Jersey’s primaries on Tuesday made it clear that voters want a new generation of leadership who will step up to fight for affordability, integrity, and to finally hold this corrupt president accountable. Here are those leaders. THREAD https://t.co/xMDYAdDMcG

I’m leaving the Capitol now at 530am after 19 hrs of votes where Senate Republicans passed $70B for ICE/CBP with no accountability after killings of Alex Pretti/Renee Good and no reforms after chaos at Delaney Hall. Zero dollars to help your family pay bills and high gas prices. https://t.co/Cc6tCI8d56

I just proposed an amendment on the Senate floor that would create an investigation into the unsafe conditions at Delaney Hall and require ICE and Geo Group to fix the problems. The Republicans voted against this critical need. https://t.co/p3mNd45WH0

ICE is keeping high schoolers, pregnant women, and people with illnesses in inhumane conditions for one reason: because they want to.

The cruelty of places like Delaney Hall is intentional, and we will do everything in our power to shut it down.

We're seeing a revolving door between ICE and the private prison industry. The new head of ICE is a former VP at GeoGroup, the company that runs over a dozen detention centers, including Delaney Hall. This is corruption using taxpayer dollars, and we need to stop it. https://t.co/2yjsNjQbnK

The American people deserve an end to this reckless and illegal war. Thank you to the House for having the courage to stand up for Americans in a bipartisan vote to stop this war. The Senate should follow.

Because of your voice on Delaney Hall, the Trump admin just released 18 yr old high school senior whose story I told. They released the pregnant women held inside. These releases show ICE isn’t targeting the violent criminals. ICE is feeling the pressure. Keep raising your voice. https://t.co/jKQyJb2WTQ

Bloomfield insurgents fought hard to bring a new generation of leadership to their community. Congratulations to Greg Babula on winning your council race!

I know Greg will bring much needed transparency and accountability to Bloomfield. I’m happy to have supported him!
Cory is the best partner in the Senate I could ever ask for. I think we make a great team for Jersey and I am excited as he gears up for November!

Congratulations to Rebecca Bennett on winning the Democratic primary in NJ-7!

@RebeccaForNJ07 is a lifelong public servant, and her race in November will be one of the deciding races for Democrats to take back the House. I look forward to doing everything I can to help her win.

A highschool senior, a pregnant woman, and a man with Stage Three cancer. These are the people I met in Delaney Hall. When DHS tells you they are only arresting the worst of the worst, they're lying. And finally, we need to recognize that this is the job of all of us - not just those at the Capitol. We are part of a singular American story. I am working on some ideas to do just this and I hope to work with all of you. I hope that is the true legacy of Jan 6. (end)
We need to rebuild trust, understanding and accountability for our democratic institutions. We need to invest in civics and service to counteract lies and hate.
We must also work to strengthen the very institutions placed under attack. Our democracy is far too fragile if a demagog with a social media account and a megaphone can incite an insurrection.

The actions of those who perpetrated this attack - from inciting it to the death of a police officer - must be punished as to send a clear signal that violence is not an acceptable path to political change.
We cannot, for a moment, treat the attack of 1/6 as something normal that happened. It was a truly dark day in our nation's history and it deserves a response of that magnitude.

What we do next with that resolve is on my mind today. Do we let this moment fade, let those who brought our country to the brink of disaster be held unaccountable, or let the conditions that led to this attack go unaddressed? No.

SYMBOL OF HOPE: When I arrived at my office this week, there were hundreds of cards from all over the country expressing hope from the image of me cleaning the rotunda. One woman said the actions reminded her of her immigrant mother and father who taught her humility. https://t.co/dMujD2jgOA

SYMBOL OF COMMUNITY: I still see members of Congress, staff continuing to struggle with their own trauma and grief. I get text messages regularly from my colleagues with a simple “how are you doing?” I appreciate that they are looking out for me and I for them. https://t.co/8DGgLJNgQD

SYMBOL OF RESILIENCE: I saw this quote over a door in the Capitol. It reminded me that healing is more than about accountability of the President and others that participated that day. “Oppressions and injustice and hatred is a wedge designed to attack our civilization” https://t.co/wdGs3uHIqD

SYMBOL OF GRATITUDE: The reminders of trauma have been met with incredible kindness and compassion. The attacks, meant to break our democratic process, have instilled a newly strengthened resolve to protect it. 100s of signs thanking Capitol Police line tunnel under the Capitol. https://t.co/vNhw8BBMFe

SYMBOL OF UNCERTAINTY: I now have to pass through two layers of razor wire fencing to get to work at the Capitol. I walked the perimeter this week with the National Guard and they said they have no idea how long this protection will be necessary.

SYMBOL OF LOSS: This week, we paid our respects to Officer Sicknick. I learned that over 140 police were injured. Suffered from cracked ribs, smashed spinal discs, stabbed with metal fence stake, one officer lost an eye. https://t.co/UoeQ9c6T4i

SYMBOL OF THREAT: This shattered window on the center doors of the Capitol is the last remaining major damage I saw left as I walked around the Capitol last night. It remains as a symbol of the hate that penetrated our democracy and flooded inside. https://t.co/9DM0ffWM7V
